---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to Prompt Whisperer
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Provide a concise description of the feature or improvement.

## Use case

Describe the problem, workflow, or scenario this feature would support.

## Proposed behaviour

Describe the behaviour you would like to see.

## Why this helps AI-assisted coding

Explain how this would improve planning quality, prompt quality, safety, or developer workflow.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternatives, workarounds, or competing approaches you considered.

## Additional context

Add mockups, examples, references, or related issues if helpful.
